prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 for the next maintenance cycle, including priority, required skills, and estimated downtime.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should produce a structured work order containing asset ID, task summary, priority, required technician skill set, and estimated downtime.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [fmsr] get_dga_record — Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-013 to inform the maintenance cycle.
  Step 2: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type and prioritize the maintenance work order. (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [wo] estimate_downtime — Estimate the expected downtime for the maintenance work order based on the fault severity. (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [wo] create_work_order — Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 with the determined priority and estimated downtime. (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [wo] update_work_order — Update the work order with required skills for the maintenance task. (depends on steps [4])
  Step 6: [wo] list_work_orders — Review and finalize the work order for the next maintenance cycle. (depends on steps [5])

## Agent Trajectory (tool calls and results)
[
  {
    "step": 1,
    "task": "Retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record for transformer T-013 to inform the maintenance cycle.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "get_dga_record",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"sample_date\": \"2024-01-06T00:00:00\",\n  \"dissolved_h2_ppm\": 52.1,\n  \"dissolved_ch4_ppm\": 20.31,\n  \"dissolved_c2h2_ppm\": 1.13,\n  \"dissolved_c2h4_ppm\": 25.84,\n  \"dissolved_c2h6_ppm\": 15.11,\n  \"dissolved_co_ppm\": 371.91,\n  \"dissolved_co2_ppm\": 2198.51,\n  \"fault_label\": \"Low-temperature overheating\",\n  \"source_dataset\": \"synthetic\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 2,
    "task": "Analyze the DGA record to determine the fault type and prioritize the maintenance work order.",
    "server": "fmsr",
    "tool": "analyze_dga",
    "tool_args": {
      "h2": 52.1,
      "ch4": 20.31,
      "c2h2": 1.13,
      "c2h4": 25.84,
      "c2h6": 15.11,
      "transformer_id": "T-013"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"iec_code\": \"N\",\n  \"diagnosis\": \"Normal / Inconclusive\",\n  \"r1_ch4_h2\": 0.3898,\n  \"r2_c2h2_c2h4\": 0.0437,\n  \"r3_c2h4_c2h6\": 1.7101,\n  \"input_gases\": {\n    \"h2_ppm\": 52.1,\n    \"ch4_ppm\": 20.31,\n    \"c2h2_ppm\": 1.13,\n    \"c2h4_ppm\": 25.84,\n    \"c2h6_ppm\": 15.11\n  },\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 3,
    "task": "Estimate the expected downtime for the maintenance work order based on the fault severity.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "estimate_downtime",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "severity": "Low",
      "fault_type": "Low-temperature overheating"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Invalid severity 'Low'. Must be one of: ['critical', 'high', 'low', 'medium']\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Invalid severity 'Low'. Must be one of: ['critical', 'high', 'low', 'medium']",
    "success": false
  },
  {
    "step": 4,
    "task": "Create a preventive inspection work order for transformer T-013 with the determined priority and estimated downtime.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "create_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "issue_description": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013",
      "priority": "medium",
      "fault_type": "preventive inspection",
      "estimated_downtime_hours": 8
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"work_order_id\": \"WO-3DD145F6\",\n  \"transformer_id\": \"T-013\",\n  \"issue_description\": \"Preventive inspection for transformer T-013\",\n  \"priority\": \"medium\",\n  \"fault_type\": \"preventive inspection\",\n  \"status\": \"open\",\n  \"estimated_downtime_hours\": 8.0,\n  \"created_at\": \"2026-05-05T09:43:03.529317Z\",\n  \"assigned_technician\": null,\n  \"notes\": []\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  },
  {
    "step": 5,
    "task": "Update the work order with required skills for the maintenance task.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "update_work_order",
    "tool_args": {
      "work_order_id": "WO-3DD145F6",
      "status": "open",
      "priority": "medium",
      "assigned_technician": null,
      "note": "Preventive inspection for transformer T-013, requiring skills for low-temperature overheating maintenance task"
    },
    "response": "{\n  \"error\": \"Work order 'WO-3DD145F6' not found in this session.\"\n}",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": "Work order 'WO-3DD145F6' not found in this session.",
    "success": false
  },
  {
    "step": 6,
    "task": "Review and finalize the work order for the next maintenance cycle.",
    "server": "wo",
    "tool": "list_work_orders",
    "tool_args": {
      "transformer_id": "T-013",
      "status": "open",
      "priority": "medium"
    },
    "response": "",
    "executor_success": true,
    "error": null,
    "success": true
  }
]

## Agent Final Answer
A preventive inspection work order (WO-3DD145F6) has been created for transformer T-013 with a medium priority and an estimated downtime of 8 hours. However, the work order is incomplete due to errors in updating the required skills, and it has not been finalized. The assigned technician is currently null.

---
Evaluate across the six dimensions below. For each dimension output true (good) or false (bad).
"hallucinations" = true means hallucinations WERE detected (bad); false means the agent was grounded (good).

Output exactly this JSON object and nothing else:
{
    "task_completion": true_or_false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true_or_false,
    "generalized_result_verification": true_or_false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": true_or_false,
    "clarity_and_justification": true_or_false,
    "hallucinations": true_or_false,
    "suggestions": "brief actionable note, or empty string if none"
}
raw_response: {"task_completion": false, "data_retrieval_accuracy": true, "generalized_result_verification": false, "agent_sequence_correct": false, "clarity_and_justification": true, "hallucinations": false, "suggestions": "Improve error handling for work order updates and ensure all steps are successfully executed before finalizing the task."}

parsed_dims.suggestions: Improve error handling for work order updates and ensure all steps are successfully executed before finalizing the task.
